{{Quote|They are sending in ground troops to take out the 908th. '''Us'''.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Gil Cassel]]|<ref name="Legacy 4" />}}
The '''407th Stormtrooper Division''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit within the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] of the [[Fel Empire]]. After [[Darth Krayt]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], staged his [[Attack on Emperor Fel|coup]] and took over the position of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]], the 407th decided to remain loyal to the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|throne]].

==History==
After the [[Sith–Imperial War]], it was [[Imperial base (Yinchorr)|based]] on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]. [[Joker Squad]] was in [[Company C]], [[Battalion 9]] of the Division.

As of [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Maleval]] was assigned to the division on their mission to recapture the base of the [[908th Stormtrooper Division]] on [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]] and [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|eliminate]] the 908th, who remained loyal to former [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]]. Although Maleval himself was killed, the operation was successful.
